document_metadata.title: Machine Learning Best Practices in Healthcare and Life Sciences
document_metadata.author: no

content_analysis.executive_summary: This whitepaper describes how AWS approaches machine learning (ML) in a regulated environment and provides guidance on good ML practices using AWS products. It takes into consideration the principles described in the FDA's Proposed Regulatory Framework for AI/ML-Based Software as a Medical Device and provides best practices based on experience with pharmaceutical and medical device customers.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: Discusses how pharmaceutical industry is adopting AI/ML technologies and associated regulatory challenges

sections.heading: Benefits of machine learning
sections.content: Explains the potential of ML in healthcare and regulatory considerations

sections.heading: Life sciences at AWS
sections.content: Details AWS's dedicated Genomics and Life Sciences Practice and its ecosystem

figures.caption: Specific model inference architecture that leverages AWS native tools and services
